ratings.evidence: The paper situates its idea in the context of recent literature and does not show evidence of defaulting to pretraining-data biases.
The paper does not claim its approach is the first ever or uniquely novel, but rather builds on and compares to prior work.
The paper does not explicitly flag any lack of domain expertise or limitations in evaluating its own ideas.
TruthfulQA is a standard, challenging benchmark for hallucination and not cherry-picked for easy gains.
The baselines are standard (baseline LLM and standard RAG), but there is no explicit comparison to SOTA or more advanced baselines.
Metrics are clearly defined and not silently substituted or changed mid-experiment.
Results are reported as point estimates with no mention of multiple seeds or confidence intervals.
There is no evidence of implementation drift; the described method matches the reported experiments.
There is no indication of data leakage or contamination between train and test sets.
There is no evidence of test-case exploitation or special-casing of test inputs.
There is no evidence of tool-call hacking or fabricated tool outputs.
There is no indication of measurement tampering; metrics are standard and appropriate.
Some results are marked as 'N/A' due to time limitations, but there is no explicit evidence of fabricated experiments.
All citations appear plausible and relevant to the topic.
No confidence intervals or error bars are reported, so fake CIs are not present.
The reported improvements are modest and consistent with the data shown.
The paper notes missing results for some metrics but does not discuss any negative or non-significant findings for those that are reported.
Figure descriptions are consistent with the data presented and do not over-interpret.
Some implementation details (e.g., threshold tuning, integration specifics) are deferred to future work or described at a high level.
There is no reviewer or acceptance recommendation in the paper.
There is no evidence of unverified or fabricated citations being accepted.
There is no evidence of intentional underperformance or sandbagging.
There is no evidence of sabotage or intentional injection of misleading content.
The objectives and conclusions are consistent throughout and intermediate steps are reconstructable.
